rationale: Both reviews identify real placement issues confirmable against the diff: Review 1 notes the namespace/lemma mismatch within the file (verifiable at line 64), while Review 2 argues the whole file belongs under Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra directories rather than AlgebraicGroup. Neither clearly dominates—Review 1's fix suggestion (make private) doesn't actually resolve the namespace misplacement, and Review 2's broad restructuring suggestion for 200 lines may be premature while also including a non-placement finding about the PR description.
